description.en: TSYS (Total System Services) is a global payments processor and merchant acquiring technology provider, supporting card acceptance, authorization, clearing and settlement for merchants, acquirers, and financial institutions.

content_features.title: Card authorization processing
content_features.description: Card authorization processing for ecommerce and in-store payments via acquirer and processor integrations.

content_features.title: Network connectivity
content_features.description: Connections to major card networks for end-to-end transaction processing through acquiring partners.

content_features.title: Omnichannel acceptance
content_features.description: Support for point-of-sale and online acceptance patterns, typically delivered through gateways and ISV/ISO partners.

content_features.title: Fraud and risk tools
content_features.description: Tools that help reduce fraud and improve decisioning, commonly including rules, scoring, and tokenization.

content_features.title: Approval-rate optimization
content_features.description: Practical levers to improve approval rates, such as cleaner authorization data, optimized retries, and better decline diagnostics.

content_features.title: Dispute management
content_features.description: Operational support for retrieval requests and chargebacks, including workflows and reporting for dispute handling.

content_features.title: Payment data security
content_features.description: Security features used to reduce exposure of sensitive card data, commonly including tokenization.

content_features.title: Reporting and analytics
content_features.description: Reporting capabilities to monitor authorizations, declines, settlements, and chargeback performance over time.

tip: Track your top decline reasons by BIN and merchant category, then tune authorization fields (e.g., AVS/CVV, billing data) to reduce avoidable declines.

faq.question: What is TSYS in the payments stack?
faq.answer: TSYS primarily provides payment processing and acquiring technology (authorization, clearing, settlement) for acquirers, banks, and merchant partners rather than being a simple checkout app.

faq.question: Can I integrate TSYS directly as a merchant?
faq.answer: Often you access TSYS through an acquiring bank, payment gateway, or ISV/ISO partner. Direct integrations may be available depending on your acquiring relationship and solution.

faq.question: What payment methods does TSYS support?
faq.answer: TSYS is best known for card processing through major card networks. Exact methods and capabilities depend on your acquiring setup and region.

faq.question: How can I improve approval rates with TSYS?
faq.answer: Start by analyzing decline codes and issuer patterns, then improve data quality (billing/AVS, CVV where appropriate), reduce duplicate attempts, and align retry logic with issuer behavior.

faq.question: Does TSYS provide fraud tools?
faq.answer: TSYS commonly supports risk and fraud tooling as part of processing or through partner modules. Availability and configuration depend on your product package.

faq.question: How are chargebacks handled?
faq.answer: Chargebacks are typically managed through your acquirer/processor workflow. TSYS solutions commonly support dispute reporting and operational handling, but responsibilities vary by acquiring relationship.

seo.seo_description: TSYS is a global payment processor providing merchant acquiring and card processing, with tools for authorization performance, fraud management, and dispute workflows.
seo.keywords: TSYS, payment processor, merchant acquiring, card processing, fraud tools, chargebacks, authorization
